case_title: JOAN CRANDON RESPONDENT VS. AMERICAN AIRLINES APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT AMERICAN AIRLINES AS TO RESPONDENT CRANDON, JOHN HEARING SET FOR AUG-14-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
